problem id: 6b63b010
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(5)

examples:
  10000111 -> 00000100
  10101111 -> 00000101
  11000010 -> 00000110
  10010101 -> 00000100
  00101001 -> 00000001
  00111011 -> 00000001
  10011110 -> 00000100
  10010011 -> 00000100
  11010001 -> 00000110

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 00000110
